column1: # Speaker watchlist for scan_flags.py — review prompts, NOT a blocklist and NOT auto-edited.
# A hit only means "look here and judge against SPEAKER-PROFILE.md" — flag or keep is your call.
# Lives at the speaker project root (walk-up resolved). Columns:
# category = one of the agnostic flag categories (SENSITIVE, ATTRIBUTION, VERSION, …).
# term = a plain word or a Python regex (case-insensitive). Keep it broad; precision is the
# editorial pass's job, not the grep's.

column3: group-reference — check tone of the surrounding aside
vague source — verify or drop the attribution
confirm version tag + whether the exposition leans on KJV wording
